description: Comprehensive review of the voice notes/insights UX: create living documentation of pipeline architecture, button/action mapping, data flows, and known issues; remove dead code; fix button context-awareness in InsightsTab; audit Sent to Parents and My Impact tabs; produce UAT test plan and market-readiness checklist. Based on the code audit at docs/audit/voice-insights-comprehensive-audit.md.

contextAndDependencies.problemStatement: Issue #639 requests a comprehensive review of voice notes/insights UX to map workflows, identify duplication, fix button confusion, and ensure the feature is documented and market-ready. A code audit has been completed; this PRD executes the documentation, cleanup, and UX fixes.
criticalContext: Active bugs (#624, #634, #592, etc.) remain as separate issues — this PRD does NOT fix them
Type-specific application (Apply writing to domain tables) is documented as a gap but NOT implemented here
No InsightsTab decomposition — the 2102-line file is documented as a maintenance risk but not split
v1/v2 dual pipeline coexistence is documented, not resolved
The audit at docs/audit/voice-insights-comprehensive-audit.md is the primary reference for all stories

readinessLevel: 100% - Comprehensive audit complete, all files identified, scope bounded

userStories.title: Create voice pipeline architecture documentation
userStories.description: As a developer onboarding to the voice feature, I need a single document showing how voice notes flow through the system end-to-end so I can understand the architecture without reading 10,000+ lines of code.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/features/voice-notes/pipeline-architecture.md
Document 8 flows: in-app recording, in-app typed, WhatsApp audio, WhatsApp text, v2 claims pipeline, entity resolution, draft confirmation, review microsite
Each flow includes: entry point function, tables written, actions triggered, end state
Include Mermaid diagram showing v1 vs v2 pipeline paths
Reference source files with line numbers for each step
userStories.notes: Read docs/audit/voice-insights-comprehensive-audit.md Section 6 for flow details. Read packages/backend/convex/actions/voiceNotes.ts (transcribeAudio, buildInsights), packages/backend/convex/actions/whatsapp.ts (processIncomingMessage), packages/backend/convex/models/voiceNotes.ts (createTypedNote, createRecordedNote). Also read packages/backend/convex/actions/claimsExtraction.ts and packages/backend/convex/actions/draftGeneration.ts for v2 pipeline.

userStories.title: Create UX button and action mapping documentation
userStories.description: As a developer fixing button confusion (#639), I need a document mapping every button in the voice notes UI to its mutation, visibility condition, and identified context-awareness issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/features/voice-notes/ux-button-action-map.md
Map buttons across: InsightsTab, ParentsTab, TeamInsightsTab, DraftsTab, AutoApprovedTab, review microsite
Each button entry includes: label, component file:line, mutation called, visibility condition, parameters
Identify context-awareness issues: buttons shown for wrong category types, buttons enabled without required data
Cross-reference with #618 (apply without assignment) and #639 (button confusion)
userStories.notes: Read insights-tab.tsx for Apply/Dismiss/Edit/Assign/Classify/Bulk buttons. Read auto-approved-tab.tsx for Revoke/Restrict buttons. Read team-insights-tab.tsx for team-specific actions. Check whatsappReviewLinks.ts for microsite actions (applyInsightFromReview, dismissInsightFromReview). Note TEAM_LEVEL_CATEGORIES = ['team_culture', 'todo'] which should suppress player assignment UI.

userStories.title: Create data flow and table relationships documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single reference showing what writes where across the 31 voice-related tables, which categories auto-apply, and where the type-specific application gap exists.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/features/voice-notes/data-flow-tables.md
Group tables by category: Core (5), v2 Pipeline (6), Parent Communication (6), Trust (3), Monitoring (3), WhatsApp (5), Team/Cost (3+)
For each table: purpose, key fields, indexes, which functions write to it, which functions read it
Document the type-specific application gap: list 15 categories, mark which auto-apply, which write to domain tables, which only set status
Include table relationship diagram showing foreign key chains
userStories.notes: Read packages/backend/convex/schema.ts for table definitions. Read audit Section 3 for table inventory. The critical gap: updateInsightStatus in voiceNotes.ts routes injury→playerInjuries, skill_rating→sportPassports, but 7 of 15 categories just mark status without downstream writes. Document this explicitly.

userStories.title: Create known issues and gaps tracking documentation
userStories.description: As the product team, I need a single document tracking known bugs with root causes, duplication locations, feature gaps, and priority/severity so we can plan sprint work.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/features/voice-notes/known-issues-gaps.md
Document 6 active bugs (#624, #634, #618, #616, #614, #592) with: symptom, root cause, affected code files, severity, fix complexity estimate
Document duplication: 5 components calling updateInsightStatus, 3 trust level query variants, 3 team insight display locations
Document feature gaps: type-specific application, duplicate insight detection, coach entity resolution
Link each item to its GitHub issue number
userStories.notes: Read audit Sections 7 (Duplication), 8 (Active Bugs), 11 (Recommendations). Each bug has root cause analysis in the audit. Priority order: #624 > #592 > #618 > #634 > #616 > #614.

userStories.title: Delete deprecated voice-insights-section.tsx
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dead code removed so the codebase stays clean and searchable.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep codebase for imports of voice-insights-section (not the -improved version) to confirm zero usage
Delete apps/web/src/app/orgs/[orgId]/players/[playerId]/components/voice-insights-section.tsx
Run: npm run check-types
Run: npm run build
userStories.notes: This is 387 lines of dead code. The replacement is voice-insights-section-improved.tsx which IS actively imported. Verify with: grep -r 'voice-insights-section' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' apps/web/src/ — should only show the -improved variant and the file itself.

userStories.title: Audit review-tab.tsx and document legacy status
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to know whether review-tab.tsx (355 lines) is legacy dead code or still in use, and document the finding.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep for imports of review-tab across the codebase
Check voice-notes-dashboard.tsx tab array for review-tab inclusion
If unused: delete the file, run npm run check-types and npm run build
If used: document where and why in docs/features/voice-notes/known-issues-gaps.md under Duplication section
Update docs/features/voice-notes/ux-button-action-map.md with finding
userStories.notes: review-tab.tsx at apps/web/src/app/orgs/[orgId]/coach/voice-notes/components/review-tab.tsx contains parent summary approval and insight apply/dismiss — duplicating ParentsTab and InsightsTab functionality. The dashboard tabs array in voice-notes-dashboard.tsx does NOT appear to include it. Likely safe to delete.

userStories.title: Document duplicate mutation patterns across components
userStories.description: As a developer planning future cleanup, I need documentation of where the same mutations are called from multiple components so we can plan shared hooks.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a 'Duplication Inventory' section to docs/features/voice-notes/known-issues-gaps.md
List updateInsightStatus callers: insights-tab.tsx, team-insights-tab.tsx, review-tab.tsx, swipeable-insight-card.tsx, board-insight-card.tsx
List approveSummary/suppressSummary callers: parents-tab.tsx, review-tab.tsx
List trust level query variants: getCoachTrustLevel, getCoachPlatformTrustLevel, getCoachTrustLevelInternal
For each, note the component file and line number
userStories.notes: This story only documents — no code changes. Use grep to find all callers. The 5 confidence score fields (voiceNoteInsights.confidenceScore, coachTrustLevels.confidenceThreshold, coachTrustLevels.personalizedThreshold, insightDrafts.aiConfidence, insightDrafts.overallConfidence) should also be documented.

userStories.title: Fix button context-awareness in InsightsTab
userStories.description: As a coach reviewing insights, I should only see actions relevant to the insight type — not all buttons for every insight regardless of category.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit apps/web/src/app/orgs/[orgId]/coach/voice-notes/components/insights-tab.tsx
Hide 'Engage Team' button for non-team categories (only show for team_culture, todo)
Disable 'Apply' button when insight has no playerIdentityId assigned (show tooltip: 'Assign a player first')
Show 'Assign Coach' action only for todo category, 'Select Team' only for team_culture
Run: npm run check-types
userStories.notes: TEAM_LEVEL_CATEGORIES = ['team_culture', 'todo']. The insight card rendering section is in the middle of insights-tab.tsx. Look for the action buttons area — currently shows Apply/Dismiss/Edit/Classify/Assign for ALL insights regardless of category. The fix is conditional rendering based on insight.category and insight.playerIdentityId. Keep Dismiss and Edit visible for all types.

userStories.title: Audit Sent to Parents tab visibility and trust gate display
userStories.description: As a coach, the Sent to Parents tab should appear/hide correctly based on trust gates, and status badges should render accurately.
acceptanceCriteria: Read auto-approved-tab.tsx and voice-notes-dashboard.tsx trust gate logic
Verify tab visibility matches Flow 7 in audit: admin block → self-disable → trust gates disabled → admin override → trust level ≥ 2
Verify status badges render correctly: Revoked (red), Viewed (green), Delivered (blue), Pending (gray)
Document any discrepancies in docs/features/voice-notes/known-issues-gaps.md
If simple wiring fixes found (wrong query field, missing condition), apply them and run npm run check-types
userStories.notes: voice-notes-dashboard.tsx lines 420-522 handle tab visibility. auto-approved-tab.tsx lines ~200-300 handle status badges. The self-service toggle (Phase 8 Week 1.5) is at lines 637-739. Check that accessCheck query returns the right fields and that the cascade of conditions matches the trust gate flow.

userStories.title: Audit My Impact dashboard data accuracy
userStories.description: As a coach, My Impact metrics should accurately reflect my activity — voice notes created, insights applied, summaries sent, and parent engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Read my-impact-tab.tsx and getCoachImpactSummary query in voiceNotes.ts
Check if autoAppliedInsights are included in the applied count (audit says they're missing)
Check if date range filtering works correctly across all metric cards
Document findings in docs/features/voice-notes/known-issues-gaps.md under 'My Impact Data Gaps'
If simple wiring fixes found (missing query join, wrong count), apply them and run npm run check-types
userStories.notes: getCoachImpactSummary in voiceNotes.ts aggregates across voiceNotes + insights + summaries. Audit Insight 4 says it does NOT query autoAppliedInsights table. Also check if parent view rate calculation depends on viewedAt field. CSV export should include both manual and auto-applied insights.

userStories.title: Create voice insights UAT test plan
userStories.description: As QA, I need manual test scripts for voice notes so we can systematically verify each workflow before release.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/features/voice-notes/uat-test-plan.md
Write test scripts for: record voice note, type text note, apply insight (per category), dismiss insight, assign player, parent summary approval, parent summary suppression
Write test scripts for: trust gate visibility, auto-apply at trust level 2+, undo auto-applied, review microsite flow
Each test script includes: preconditions, steps, expected result, pass/fail column
Reference test account: neil.B@blablablak.com / lien1979
userStories.notes: Test scripts should cover the 8 flows from the audit. For each flow, list the exact UI steps a tester would follow. Include edge cases: apply without player assigned (should be blocked after US-VR-008), empty insights list, trust level 0 coach trying to access Sent to Parents. Keep scripts concise — bullet points, not paragraphs.

userStories.title: Create market-readiness checklist
userStories.description: As the product team, I need a go/no-go checklist evaluating whether voice insights is ready for market based on feature completeness, known blockers, and quality assessment.
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/features/voice-notes/market-readiness-checklist.md
Score each workflow: in-app recording, WhatsApp, parent summaries, trust gates, auto-apply, review microsite, My Impact
For each: status (Ready/Partial/Blocked), blocking issues, workarounds available
Create overall go/no-go recommendation with criteria: >80% workflows Ready = Go, any Critical bug = No-Go
List minimum fixes required for launch: reference specific GitHub issue numbers
userStories.notes: Based on audit findings: #624 (parent queue broken) is likely a No-Go blocker. #592 (iOS lock) blocks mobile users. Type-specific application gap means 'Applied' insights don't actually update domain tables — document as known limitation with workaround (coaches must manually update player profiles). The checklist should be honest about what works and what doesn't.

verificationSteps: npx ultracite fix && npm run check
Verify 5 documentation files exist in docs/features/voice-notes/
Verify voice-insights-section.tsx deleted (and review-tab.tsx if confirmed unused)
Manual test: open InsightsTab, verify team_culture insight shows team actions only
Manual test: open InsightsTab, verify unassigned insight has Apply disabled
successCriteria: 5 documentation files created in docs/features/voice-notes/ covering pipeline, buttons, data flow, issues, and market readiness
Button context-awareness works: category-appropriate actions shown per insight type
Market-readiness checklist completed with honest go/no-go assessment
UAT test plan covers all 8 pipeline flows with step-by-step scripts
No type check or lint regressions
